M-CERTS.NAME: TLS Provisioning
M-CERTS.Purpose: Acquire and refresh TLS certificates for the base domain and wildcard subdomains used by domain fronting.

Scope.Item: Handle apex and wildcard certificate provisioning
Persist certificate material for container reuse
Automate REG.RU DNS-01 when provider credentials are available

Interfaces.Interface: Invokes Certbot or equivalent challenge workflow.
Publishes stable certificate mount paths to the runtime.

Risks.Risk: Wildcard certificates likely require DNS-01, not plain HTTP-01
Renewal must not break live traffic
